_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Assist in the coordination, validation, and management of all-source collection requirements, plans, and/or activities.
reference_document_element_description: Establish and maintain the enterprise data catalog, business glossary, and metadata management program, ensuring discoverability, lineage visibility, and classification currency.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-002 (OP, cosine: 0.544), SP-T-003 (SP, cosine: 0.542).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.416). Shared vocabulary: [management]. DCWF-only terms [activities, assist, collection, coordination, plans, requirements] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, catalog, classification, currency, data, discoverability] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.870, R=0.860). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Assist in the coordination, validation, and management of all-source collection" and "Establish and maintain the enterprise data catalog, business glossary, and metad" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.556 > STS 0.416 (gap +0.140). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [management] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [management]. DCWF-only: [activities, assist, collection, coordination, plans, requirements]. WIDAI-only: [business, catalog, classification, currency, data, discoverability].

signals.detail: STS 0.416 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.140 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
